channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Unnessessary resurfacing, 14th April
item.description:
Priors. Rd Cheltenham to be resurfaced on 20 April.This road has already been resurfaced and in perfect condition with NO potholes.????
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 260, Priors Road, Lynworth, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Request for a recycling / litter bin by B bus stop, 14th April
item.description:
Please can we request a litter and recycling bin be installed by the ‘B’ bus stop on Bafford Approach? (The one by the bush with the red leaves). The bus stop has the Southfield brook running behind it and lots of litter is falling down from the bus stop and into the stream which runs along the back of our garden. We think litter may be dropped by people waiting for the bus - obviously we can’t be sure - but a bin might encourage people to recycle and dispose of litter properly.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 53, Bafford Approach, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple potholes around mini roundabout, 14th April
item.description:
Mini roundabout junction Station Road, Parton Road. On Friday9/4 at approximately 3.15pm, 4 vans appeared at this location with 8 workmen, that I could see. Signs were placed to block all access to the site for 15 minutes. I observed one pothole being temporarily fixed. The tarmac put in to the crater was not flush with the road surface, I spoke with a man who appeared to be in charge. He explained that this was temporary, that the whole road surface needs removing but they could only fill one crater, the tarmac had been on the back of the truck since 8am and goes cold in 4 hours and would most likely not work. Their work load was 45 craters for that day and only half had been visited. They then had to travel back to Birmingham. Please can this site be looked at as a matter of urgency…temporary fixes on temporary fixes are not resolving this matter, at all.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parton Road, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
